title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: 4X GTA$ and RP on New Stoner Survival
content:
Fight off aliens, life-sized action figures, wrench-wielding clowns, and Cluckin’ Bell-uniformed chickens in the colorful chaos of Stoner Survival — a trippy new mode that activates at 4:20pm every day in Los Santos that’s dealing out 4X GTA$ and RP through April 22.

Keep an eye out for the Survival Blip to appear when in Freemode and head to the Senora Desert Trailer Park to get underway. Make it through five waves of Stoner Survival to add the Sasquatch Outfit and GTA$420,000 to your stash.
